title: Were Neanderthals Culturally Modern Humans? - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews geneticist David Reich on the question of whether Neanderthals possessed cultural modernity. The discussion examines evidence from archaeological and genetic perspectives on Neanderthal behavior and cognition.
